'''Yevethan''' was the native language of the [[Yevetha]] species from [[N'zoth]] III.<ref name="uaa" />

The Yevetha were, biologically, able to speak other languages, but their isolationist nature made them reject the languages of other species. Only rarely would a Yevethan learn [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], as this would often decrease their social standing.<ref name="uaa" />

==Known Vocabulary==
*''[[Darama]]'' - literally "Chosen One"
*''[[Darna]]'' - Yevethan male's senior mate
*''[[Daraya]]'' - literally "brightness"
*''[[Etaias]]'' - honorific term for elders
*''[[Mara-nas]]'' - birth-casks for young Yevetha
*''[[Marasi]]'' - term for female Yevetha
*''[[Narada-ti]]'' - Yevethan midwife
*''[[Nitakka]]'' - term for male Yevetha
*''[[Noreti]]'' - Yevethan standard greeting
*''[[Tolotan]]'' - Yevethan religious text

==Phrases==
*''Hi noka daraya!'' - "The Brightness touches me!"
*''Ko nakaza!'' - "Glory in the kill!"
*''Ni toi [[darama]]'' - "The Blessed comes to us."
*''Soko [[darama]]'' - "For the honor of the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]], the Blessed and the All."
*''Thetan nitakka, ko nakaza!'' - "To the strongest of us, glory in the kill!"

{{Language-stub}}
